en: Technology, the thing that will eventually make television so high-def I will no longer be allowed to appear on it.

en: The point is, it is dangerous to make predictions about where tech is going.
ko: 요점은 기술의 방향을 예측하는 건 위험하다는 거예요. 그래서 오늘 밤
